description: A customer wants to return an item they bought last week and has the original receipt.

nodes.task_description: Scan the barcode on the customer's receipt.

expected_outcome.value: The POS system retrieves the original transaction details.

nodes.task_description: Scan the item being returned and visually inspect it to ensure it is in returnable condition.

expected_outcome.value: The system confirms the item was on the original transaction, and the associate verifies its condition.

nodes.task_description: Process the return, issuing a refund to the customer's original form of payment (e.g., credit card).

expected_outcome.value: The return is completed, and the refund is successfully processed.
